## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. If this is a new roadmap addition, ensure all table columns (Difficulty, Estimated Time, Resource Type, Last Updated, Rating) are filled appropriately according to the Contribution Guidelines.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (fixing a broken link or typo)
- [ ] New feature (adding a new roadmap or category)
- [ ] Documentation update (improving the README or docs)

## Checklist:

- [ ] I have read the **CONTRIBUTING** document.
- [ ] My markdown formatting is correct and does not break existing tables.
- [ ] The resource I am adding is from an official, trusted, and authoritative source.
- [ ] I have provided a concise description for the resource.
- [ ] I have verified that this resource is not a duplicate.
- [ ] My changes pass the automated markdown-lint and broken-link checks (will be visible once PR is opened).
